name: Prelude
description: Prelude — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice) tool for developers. Specializes in otp verification.

seo.title: Prelude Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Prelude analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice).

review.verdict: Prelude is a Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice) tool.
pros: Multi-channel delivery (email, SMS, voice) from one API
cons: Per-message pricing adds up at high send volumes
review.best_for: Apps sending transactional notifications at scale
review.not_for: Small projects with minimal communication needs
